articles.title: Pornhub Now Accepts Dogecoin Payments
articles.description: Dogecoin can now be used to pay for premium pornographic content. The crypto coin has been added as a payment option on Pornhub alongside several other currencies. Pornhub Adds Dogecoin, Expands Crypto Options Pornhub, one of the world’s most visited websites, now accepts payments in BNB, DOGE, USDC, and XRP. The four crypto coins have been added to Pornhub’s list of supported...

articles.description: After XRP, Bitcoin is going to be the SEC's new target, according to Peter Schiff's unsubstantiated prediction

articles.title: Moonstake and RockX Partner to Support Polkadot (DOT) Ecosystem
articles.description: A Partnership Built on RockX The Polkadot partnership sees RockX’s CEO, Alex Lam, appointed as an official advisor to Moonstake. The partnership intends to “accelerate the spread of Polkadot in the blockchain industry through staking.” This aligns with Moonstake’s mission to become the largest staking pool in Asia. Earlier this month, the staking company announced … Continued

articles.title: Pornhub adds XRP, BNB, USDC, and DOGE to its payment options
articles.description: Adult entertainment website Pornhub has added four new coins to its list of supported crypto payment options: XRP, BNB, USDC, and DOGE.

articles.title: Basic Attention Token Price Analysis - Brave platform registers one million publishers
articles.description: The Brave platform has over 1,000,000 registered publishers listed to collect BAT funds from Brave users on YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, Reddit, Vimeo, Github, SoundCloud, and other websites.

articles.title: Ripple Co-founder Sells Another 28.6 Million XRP Despite SEC Charges
articles.description: Ripple Labs co-founder Jed McCaleb has sold over 28.6 million XRP tokens this week despite the ongoing charges being laid against the company. The sale amounts to roughly $8.58 million at the time of writing. The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filed charges against the company as well as co-founder Christian Larsen, and current … Continued

articles.title: Ripple pins hopes on Biden administration as co-founder sells 28.6M XRP
articles.description: General counsel for Ripple Stu Alderoty predicted Joe Biden’s administration would likely “help level the playing field” for crypto.
